name: Icon
description: Icon wrapper with size, color, directional, and accessibility support. Supports SVG children and Material Symbols font mode (renders ligature when name is set without children). Decorative by default (aria-hidden). Set label for semantic icons.
whenToUse: Displaying icons alongside text or as standalone meaningful symbols. Use font mode with Material Symbols for large icon sets.
avoidWhen: User avatar - use Avatar. Decorative images - use .
semanticRole: img (when label is set) or none (decorative)
accessibilityRequirements: Decorative icons are aria-hidden. Semantic icons require label prop for aria-label.

name.description: Icon name. In font mode (no children), rendered as ligature text for Material Symbols.

color.description: Icon color. Inherits from parent by default.

label.description: Accessible label. When set, role='img' + aria-label are applied.

directional.description: Whether to mirror in RTL layouts.

filled.description: Uses filled icon variant (FILL axis 1 in font mode).

variant.description: Material Symbols font family variant. Only used in font mode.

weight.description: Font weight axis (wght: 100-700). Only used in font mode.

grade.description: Grade axis (GRAD: -50 to 200). Only used in font mode.

route.label: Icon
route.description: Scalable icon container with sizing and RTL support

examples.title: Sizes
examples.code:
<sg-stack direction="horizontal" gap="related" align="center" wrap={true}>
    <sg-icon name="star" size="xs" label="Extra small" />
    <sg-icon name="star" size="sm" label="Small" />
    <sg-icon name="star" size="md" label="Medium" />
    <sg-icon name="star" size="default" label="Default" />
    <sg-icon name="star" size="lg" label="Large" />
    <sg-icon name="star" size="xl" label="Extra large" />
</sg-stack>

examples.title: Colors
examples.code:
<sg-stack direction="horizontal" gap="related" align="center" wrap={true}>
    <sg-icon name="check" size="lg" color="success" label="Success" />
    <sg-icon name="warning" size="lg" color="warning" label="Warning" />
    <sg-icon name="close" size="lg" color="danger" label="Danger" />
    <sg-icon name="info" size="lg" color="info" label="Info" />
    <sg-icon name="circle" size="lg" color="currentColor" label="Current" />
</sg-stack>

examples.title: Variants
examples.code:
<sg-stack direction="horizontal" gap="related" align="center" wrap={true}>
    <sg-icon name="favorite" size="lg" label="Outline heart" />
    <sg-icon name="favorite" size="lg" filled={true} label="Filled heart" />
    <sg-icon name="arrow-right" size="lg" directional={true} label="Directional arrow" />
</sg-stack>

examples.title: Material Symbols - Font Mode
examples.code:
<sg-stack direction="horizontal" gap="related" align="center" wrap={true}>
    <sg-icon name="home" size="lg" label="Home" />
    <sg-icon name="search" size="lg" label="Search" />
    <sg-icon name="settings" size="lg" label="Settings" />
    <sg-icon name="favorite" size="lg" label="Favorite" />
    <sg-icon name="delete" size="lg" label="Delete" />
    <sg-icon name="schedule" size="lg" label="Schedule" />
</sg-stack>

examples.title: Material Symbols - Filled
examples.code:
<sg-stack direction="horizontal" gap="related" align="center" wrap={true}>
    <sg-icon name="home" size="lg" filled label="Home filled" />
    <sg-icon name="favorite" size="lg" filled label="Favorite filled" />
    <sg-icon name="star" size="lg" filled label="Star filled" />
    <sg-icon name="bookmark" size="lg" filled label="Bookmark filled" />
    <sg-icon name="notifications" size="lg" filled label="Notifications filled" />
</sg-stack>
